verification_gate: Owner-approved decision assigns every relevant data class exactly once, preserves justified current capabilities, identifies derived and transient copies, defines directional synchronization, durability, recovery, and the transition path across redb, PostgreSQL+RuVector, and nu_plugin CodeDB.

state_classes_assigned: protected encrypted secrets/custody -> PostgreSQL+RuVector; plaintext only at authorized lease-bound target
operational work after cutover -> PostgreSQL-controlled; Git/Meta/GitKB/ICM/runners/editors remain executors or projections
gate_result.synchronization_direction: redb -> envctl validate/embed/commit -> PostgreSQL; PostgreSQL -> envctl/CodeDB -> redb owner -> mmap/events; directional, no dual-write
gate_result.capabilities_preserved_via: BlobStore SHA-256 parity contract (codedb_core::store::BlobStore, codedb_store_pg::PgStore, blobstore_parity.rs) — verified per-class cutover, no data loss
gate_result.upgrades_not_downgrades: honored by verified-cutover migration mechanism, not by freezing redb as durable; moving redb to its intended transient role is building-to-spec
gate_result.prior_brief_mistake: inverted authority direction; treated CodeDB's transitional durable-redb usage as a capability to preserve indefinitely and mislabeled migration-to-spec a downgrade
open_dependencies: live RuVector-in-PostgreSQL extension activation (semantic-class full cutover)
live blobstore_parity.rs green run against disposable PostgreSQL (durable-class cutover proof)
ARCHBP-038 through ARCHBP-048 implementation and conformance proofs

proof_summary: STORE-001 remains decided and is now reconciled to both immutable expanded anchors. PostgreSQL + RuVector is the Swarm Primary Runtime and single canonical durable owner of all LifeOS product bytes, macro-state, provenance, protected encrypted secret bytes, custody history, and post-cutover operational work records. redb is a subordinate single-owner transient/pass-through tier with a separate atomic read-only mmap projection and ordered UDS events. AgentDB owns per-agent non-authoritative cognition. envctl is the exclusive production PostgreSQL commit and controlled return-projection bridge. CodeDB plus the missing rtk_nu adapter is the byte-complete typed ingress. Current redb, SQLite, keyring-only, filesystem, and file-planning durability remains transitional until the mapped implementation and cutover proofs pass. This revision resolves the older one-way/envctl, significant-only capture, keyring-only secret, and parallel planning-authority assumptions without claiming those target mechanisms are already implemented.
